Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Vargas Sepulveda M, Posit Software, PBC (2025). cpp4r: A C++ Interface for R's C Interface. R package version 0.1.0, https://cpp4r.org.

  title = {cpp4r: A C++ Interface for R's C Interface},
